• There's a path to cross N Torrey Pines Rd near Muir.
• Ample amounts of parking spaces

properties.name: La Jolla Scenic Dr (East)
properties.description:
• Overnight Parking on the east side, 2-Hour parking on the west side.
• Follow signage.

properties.name: Torrey Pines Rd
properties.description: • Careful parking on the west side, sap will fall on your car, it is very difficult to remove.

properties.name: Roselle St
properties.description:
• Take the bike path to campus along the freeway
• Always has open spaces

properties.name: La Jolla Shores Dr
properties.description:
• Very Competitive.
• Note: There is one sign on the intersection of La Jolla Shores Dr and La Jolla Farms Rd. Sign reads 'No Parking All City Streets 2am-6am' I've seen cars parked here during those hours without issue. Use your own judgement.

properties.name: La Jolla Shores Dr
properties.description:
• 2 Hour Parking 8am-6pm
• General overnight parking outside of those hours.
• Note: There is one sign on the intersection of La Jolla Shores Dr and La Jolla Farms Rd. Sign reads 'No Parking All City Streets 2am-6am' I've seen cars parked here during those hours without issue. Use your own judgement.
